  4. Browse By Date

Museum Passes

Book your museum passes with your Minuteman Library card here!

Requirements:

  • Passes may be reserved up to 30 days in advance. Passes for the same museum may be reserved once every 30 days. Only one pass per household per day.
  • Digital passes will be emailed to you. Physical passes must be picked up at the library location you selected when making a reservation. 
  • More information: https://www.cambridgema.gov/Departments/cambridgepubliclibrary/iwantto/getamuseumpass

American Repertory Theater at Harvard University

SELECT SHOWS - The A.R.T. makes passes available to select performances of select shows. Availability will be determined 30 days before the start of each performance's run. Next show: Black Swan, May 29 - June 28, 2026 Each pass admits 2 people for free for either a Friday 7:30 pm performance or a Sunday 2:00 pm performance. After booking, you will receive an email confirmation with...
Book Now

Boston By Foot

SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 1 adult or 1 child for free. Visit www.bostonbyfoot.org to browse Boston By Foot's extensive public tour calendar. Passes are valid for all public walking tours; they are not valid for private tours, water-based tours, or annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail).
Book Now

Boston Children's Museum

Each pass admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person. Library Coupons are not valid for Sunday afternoons (Admission is $1 per person on Sundays from 1:30 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.). This pass is valid only on the date printed on the pass.
Book Now

Boston Harbor Islands Ferry

SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off. Summer 2026 schedule: Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 -...
Book Now

Charles River Boat Tour

SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 1 person for free. You must pick up your pass at the Main Library. 2026 Season Cruises daily May 22-September 7 Mon-Thurs at 12pm, 1:30pm and 3pm Fri-Sun at 12pm, 1:30pm, 3pm, and 4:30pm Cruises September 9-27 Wed-Thurs at 12pm, 1:30pm, and 3pm Fri-Sun at 12pm, 1:30pm, 3pm, and...
Book Now

Harvard Museums of Science & Culture

Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Passes are valid for one-time use any day through the expiration date listed on the pass. Note: Harvard Museums of Science & Culture are free to Massachusetts residents every Sunday morning (year-round) from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm and on Wednesdays from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm. Proof of residency required. This offer is not available to commercial groups.
Book Now

How Do You See the World? Experience + Mapparium™

Each pass admits up to 4 adults free of charge to the Mapparium™ globe in the How Do You See the World? experience (value $6/Adult). Youth 17 and younger are always free. All other exhibits in the How Do You See the World? experience are always free, as are weekend church tours, and neither require a ticket. Pass instructions: Redeem this pass for tickets onsite in the Welcome...
Book Now

Institute of Contemporary Art

Each pass admits 2 people at $10 per person. People age 18 and under are admitted free. This pass is not date specific and may be used any time before the expiration date printed on the pass.
Book Now

Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum

Each pass admits up to 4 adults at $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free.
Book Now

Museum of African American History

Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Children 4 years and younger are admitted for free. Pass instructions: Visit the museum’s website and use the library coupon code emailed to you to reserve a timed entry Presently, online reservations are required for all visitors.
Book Now

Museum of Fine Arts

Each promo code may be redeemed for up to 2 adult tickets at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 youth ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are admitted free. Pass instructions: After reserving the library's pass, you will receive a code Use that...
Book Now

Museum of Science

Each pass admits 4 people free admission to the Exhibit Hall. Pass instructions: You will receive a pass with a QR code on it. You do not need to make an advance reservation. Bring your pass with the QR code on it with you when you visit the Museum. Digital or printed copies are accepted. You do not need to stop at the Box Office unless you are planning on purchasing tickets to any...
Book Now

New England Aquarium

Each pass admits up to 4 people for 50% off. Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and is not valid for movie or whale watch tickets. NOTE: Starting May 26, this pass admits up to 4 people for $20 per person and is only valid on weekdays. This coupon is valid only on the date printed on the pass.
Book Now

Royall House & Slave Quarters

SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 people for free for a 50 minute guided tour. Tours are at 1:00PM, 2:00PM, and 3:00PM. Visitors are invited to walk the grounds and view the exhibits before and after the tour. Children 12 and younger are admitted free. After reserving a library pass, you will receive an email confirmation with a promo code. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before the...
Book Now

Trustees Go Pass

SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 adults & children under 18 at the Family Level admission rate. Passes are not date specific and can be used once until the expiration date printed on the pass. Valid at more than 100 Trustees properties that collect an admission fee (including Fruitlands, deCordova and The Old Manse). Please note that some properties require pre-registration....
Book Now

USS Constitution Museum

Each pass allows free admission for up to 5 visitors per day. Limit one pass per party. Admission is first come first served, no advance tickets or reservations. Present printed pass or digital pass to Admissions. Valid only for the reserved date of visit. Ship is open Wednesday-Sunday 10am-4pm and closed Mondays and Tuesdays. Museum is open daily 10am-5pm.
Book Now

Zoo New England

Each pass admits up to 6 people to either the Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or the Stone Zoo (Stoneham) at a discounted rate of $9 per adult and $6 per child.
Book Now
